title: Black sun
description: The sun has turned into a black hole, so be careful when moving around the world and keep an eye on your pets.
body:
The sun has turned into a black hole, which has increased its gravitational pull, so it will attract all entities toward it, making movement more difficult or, conversely, easier.

And don't forget that this works for absolutely all entities.

Mod review
https://youtu.be/0WWvy0BEjWY
